name: Crock-Pot Beef Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chuck or other cut beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the onion, garlic, carrots, and celery to the crockpot.
2. Place the meat on top of the vegetables.
3. Stir in the Worcestershire sauce, Kitchen Bouquet, and dry soup mix.
4. Pour the stewed tomatoes over the top.
5. Cook for 7 hours on Low heat.
6. Add the mushrooms and cook for an additional hour or so.
7. Remove the meat.
8. If a thicker gravy is desired, stir in 2 tablespoons of flour and set the crockpot to High while stirring for a minute or so.
9. Serve with rice or noodles (or add cut-up potatoes with the vegetables).
